textByHashes.9c4d73cd4d1d52eb397a0f46917f55c1625340fe: Get lost, outlander! I've no time for you!
textByHashes.35f3b7fc817da808fc9a63b84f05984551fa4083: Nothing... Just carving these horribly broken pieces of driftwood.
textByHashes.4da18746af09dc5e62433beed6ae432b69956d43: Wait! Would you do me a favour?
textByHashes.434161699f6a3d219a35c2d868d074e3572211e2: Look, you see that heap of driftwood over there? That is my ship, and all that is left of my one shot at making my ancestors proud of me.
textByHashes.fb347bb0958d8259cf048470238421f216dcf004: My family have always been great explorers and seafarers, and I recently set off on my maiden voyage.
textByHashes.e568571f3b4afe34fe2a41eead5bf428bee450c6: However, a big storm - yes, a huge storm in fact - blew my ship onto the rocks. Three times.
textByHashes.b49b70974d02c195539d9fa6c13f408501b8cfb5: I've been sitting here ever since, trying to think of a way to make my family proud, and if you will help me...I think I have a way.
textByHashes.9172f26784bd9d9edc417e025d087b5390be1d7c: Thank you! I don't have much apart from my carvings, some driftwood and the map that I was following when I had my little...
textByHashes.98829a545b14fe75a0756a4220995a1413237f2b: If you help me out, then I'll gladly hand it over.
textByHashes.7e88dd085ee0dad4538ec33ef682a177d75989f4: Well, I have a little food left, although it's a little briny.
textByHashes.0720f487985309e4cfe6d7aac88fb1a032fca482: If you take a couple of carvings to my wife and son in the village over the hill and tell them that I sent you with them from a distant island, then I can wait out here for a week or so before returning.
textByHashes.5d38dd4d4bdcb53ffb8ad43348a9534fab7d6bdd: Well, none of these are any good. I'll need some fresh wood from a decent tree.
textByHashes.8cba4671445d850f3b11d572ccc663c60e00fedb: When I was swimming for my life I saw an odd-looking windswept tree to the east of here, up that cliff.
textByHashes.ac3097d3721bbea114cf71939e360f661e2c0a88: Could you bring me some of that wood so I can work it?
textByHashes.493c4fab9694b51ecaafbeeb5b04e4e83887e636: Yes...great eyes...they run in the family.
textByHashes.989ede870dab0f1348184fe599322c0cd98c06a9: Bah! Well, if you aren't going to help, do me a favour and jump off that cliff!
textByHashes.dcb809e622e426c323c4739fc7bdcb13300497c4: So... Got the logs for me yet?
textByHashes.c897edc3d546eacde455b83e1f4da560aa46164d: Still cold. Still damp. 'Bout average, really.
textByHashes.86eed46d1669402e2c8a37b00ae0ca1a071c2749: Wonderful! I'll carve them up now.
textByHashes.6dec3d4a7195ffa0406ce91dab7fcc917de34a55: This is for my wife, Ingrid. I'm sure she will love it. Tell her it's tribal or something.
textByHashes.8ccf6c4f90440d31b37edbda24ca58e2eeb3b9b0: And this one is for my son, Volf. Kids love planks in my experience. Tell him I said hello.
textByHashes.5b2bcdf9d8d6746da2abc663b4cf0e48af5a76fe: Yes. Hurry back! And don't forget the story: I'm not here, I'm someplace far away.
textByHashes.eb404acedebb3b8b05948c72ec0af32fc799c593: So, how did my wife like her carving?
textByHashes.2f21074ca40d0cbed459794b52bf160c90bbd1fc: Well, hurry up and give it to her then!
textByHashes.86b69fbb353ff9455153d1d5e4871859d3e7b00d: I wish i could see her again...
textByHashes.9a7e839dae5a88871806a18eba966ead6d89d307: Did my son like his present? I'll bet he was thrilled.
textByHashes.7c3bb28bb9aa5f16a71c1d3cec927c3fba5f1706: Well, take your time over it, why don't you.
textByHashes.baf5a3df7be22b7f4b9a51e843968ce318e87379: I won't...go...anywhere. I don't...care if I...freeze.
textByHashes.c302560e2c840911ce699218f1c24ad61a8080ef: So...very...cold. Almost cold enough to tear up an old map with my fevered shivering. Cough, cough.
textByHashes.de4a84253d0aa87df7f32a6c32a0db179c113216: Well, okay...but could I have a little of that food first? I've had nothing but seaweed and biscuits for the past week.
textByHashes.1bd7e22d7b1526ffa9555462ca6d933e65025e4a: Okay, okay, I was only asking.
textByHashes.00190a5dde7deb6f0bb3016602d89071cfa9eb0f: Well, regardless, you've more than earned this map. It was the last one my grandfather, Sven the Helmsman, ever made.
textByHashes.1034a4ac0f23c9711c42f3bc903a7c7285b73eb9: It is supposed to show the location of one of his stashes of treasure, but I have never been able to decipher the strange, runic inscriptions that point the way.
textByHashes.44f40533c0d8695d1ea9a279005b0b979fc90a27: I'll sit here and practice carving.
textByHashes.ceb83f2f2c647f1515c4f93cb951680b484f3424: If you pass this way again, I'll be glad if you drop my next load of work off with my family.
textByHashes.fd99121e00aa249beb797c619e9cb70fa382a011: That or bring me some food before I starve. Whichever.
textByHashes.d27f7939e1807f366b82c6ceb0f0c58da8e77b75: Hey! I'm trying to carve and you're standing in my light! Move it!
textByHashes.28048198b4252f26853dbbd240f797e51ada85a6: You lost the treasured map of Sven the Helmsman? How dare you!
textByHashes.d0a7a69d6a72948977739fc41a1b36e6697f9358: You'd best take better care of this one, or else!
